title: Runloop Object
description: An Object represents a stored data entity with metadata.

id.description: The unique identifier of the Object.

state.description: The current state of the Object.

size_bytes.description: The size of the Object content in bytes (null until uploaded).

content_type.description: The content type of the Object.

create_time_ms.description: The creation time of the Object in milliseconds since epoch.

delete_after_time_ms.description: The time after which the Object will be deleted in milliseconds since epoch.

metadata.description: User defined metadata to attach to the Object for organization.

upload_url.description: Presigned URL for uploading content to S3 (only present on create).
